title: LMCache/LMCache
summary: LMCache is a KV-cache layer for LLM workloads, aimed at speeding up inference and reducing repeated computation in serving systems.
friendlySummary: LMCache helps reuse parts of LLM computation so applications can respond faster and waste less work.
whyItMatters: Teams running LLM applications can use cache-aware serving to cut latency and cost, especially for repeated prompts, shared context and multi-turn workflows.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can lower cost and latency for teams serving AI apps with repeated context or many similar requests.
